comments.body:
## Description

Create `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/blast-radius-score-output.md`.
- Signal Name: blast-radius-score
- Emitter: `plugins/dso/scripts/blast-radius-score.py`
- Parser: `plugins/dso/agents/complexity-evaluator.md` (Step 2.5)
- Fields: score (int, required), signals (array of {type, file, weight}), complex_override (bool), layer_count (int), change_type (string enum: additive/subtractive/substitutive/mixed)
- Example: representative payload
- Failure Contract: if emitter exits non-zero or is absent, parser skips Step 2.5 and continues without COMPLEX forcing
- Disambiguation note: this blast-radius measures cross-stack structural scope for complexity routing; review-complexity-classifier.sh's blast_radius measures import fan-out for review tier selection — different quantities, different contexts

TDD exemption: Static asset (criterion 3 — Markdown documentation with no conditional logic).

### File Impact
- Create: `plugins/dso/docs/contracts/blast-radius-score-output.md`

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Contract doc exists
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/contracts/blast-radius-score-output.md
- [ ] Required sections present
  Verify: grep -q "Signal Name" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/blast-radius-score-output.md && grep -q "Emitter" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/blast-radius-score-output.md && grep -q "Parser" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/blast-radius-score-output.md && grep -q "Fields" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/blast-radius-score-output.md && grep -q "Example" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/blast-radius-score-output.md
- [ ] Failure Contract section
  Verify: grep -qi "failure contract\|failure behavior" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/blast-radius-score-output.md
- [ ] Routing heuristic note
  Verify: grep -qi "routing heuristic" plugins/dso/docs/contracts/blast-radius-score-output.md
- [ ] Schema consistent with script output
  Verify: echo "src/main.py" | python3 plugins/dso/scripts/blast-radius-score.py | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert all(k in d for k in ['score','signals','complex_override','layer_count','change_type'])"
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none — doc task, criterion 3) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: ACs verified ✓ — all 5 ACs pass; bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
